title: Gateway error envelope
description: Canonical shape for every 4xx/5xx response the gateway produces and the frontend api-client consumes. Contract ORA-37; canonical home Interface Contracts §3. additionalProperties is false at every level so no stack/cause/exception/trace field can ever exist.

code.description: Closed machine-readable taxonomy; the FE's only branch key. Never branch on message.

message.description: Curated, generic, human-readable. Never an exception message, never reflects request content.

requestId.description: Opaque correlation handle; the ONLY trace exposed. Maps server-side to the full trace.

retryable.description: Server-authoritative, decoupled from code: may a retry succeed? The FE reads this boolean and never hardcodes which codes are retryable.

details.description: Present only for VALIDATION_FAILED. Closed sub-vocabulary; never the raw offending value.

field.description: The offending field name or path. Never the value.

issue.description: Machine-readable issue token (e.g. INVALID_FORMAT). Describes the problem, not the value.

allOf.$comment: details exists iff code is VALIDATION_FAILED.
